=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 10/23/02, Tucson, Arizona, Casino Del Sol, Anselmo Valencia Amphitheater, 2CDR

This recording has the same drops and digipops described for the other circulating recording
Great sound

CD1

1 To Be Alone With You (Bob on piano), 2 I'll Remember You (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 3 Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano), 4 Accidentally Like A Martyr (song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano), 5 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and harp and Larry on pedal steel), 6 Brown Sugar, 7 My Back Pages (acoustic) (Larry on violin), 8 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern, Charlie on electric and Tony on standup bass), 9 Lay, Lady, Lay (Bob on acoustic guitar and Larry on pedal steel),

CD2

1 Cold Irons Bound, 2 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic), 3 Old Man (acoustic) (Song by Neil Young), (Bob & Larry on acoustic guitars, Charlie on electric guitar, Tony on electric bass), 4 Honest With Me (Bob on piano and Larry on slide guitar), 5 Mama, You Been On My Mind (acoustic), 6 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano and Larry on slide guitar), 7 Mutineer (Song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 8 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano and Tony on standup bass), 9 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), (encore), 10 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 11 All Along The Watchtower
